function.rulebook_notes: Per process-next-inbox-item and inbox-processing-v2-update, complete the request from canonical evidence and avoid partial edits when not doable. Per reliability guidance, missing required data/file should return clarification rather than partial completion.
function.outcome_justification: The inbox task explicitly lists five files to OCR, but one specified path does not exist (direct read failed; find returned no match). Completing only four would be partial and would require guessing intent, so clarification is required before any mutation.
